title: urostachys australis
intro: Urostachys australis, also known as the Tasmanian club moss or club moss, is a small, evergreen plant native to the island of Tasmania in Australia. It belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds like lycopodine and lycoposine, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, Urostachys australis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be dried and used in capsules or as a powder for medicinal purposes.
